vocab.example: Let's start the retrospective with what went well.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy bắt đầu buổi retrospective bằng những điều đã làm tốt.

vocab.example: The deployment went well this sprint.
vocab.example_vi: Việc triển khai đã diễn ra tốt đẹp trong sprint này.

vocab.example: We need to improve our testing process.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta cần cải thiện quy trình kiểm thử.

vocab.example: Let's write down the action items before we finish.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy ghi lại các việc cần làm trước khi kết thúc.

vocab.example: This sprint was busier than usual.
vocab.example_vi: Sprint này bận hơn bình thường.

vocab.example: Please be honest about what didn't work well.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy thẳng thắn về những điều chưa hiệu quả.

vocab.example: Communication between teams was a bit slow this sprint.
vocab.example_vi: Sự giao tiếp giữa các đội hơi chậm trong sprint này.

vocab.example: We should change our testing process next sprint.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta nên thay đổi quy trình kiểm thử trong sprint tới.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Let's start the retrospective. What went well this sprint?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: I think the deployment went well — no bugs after release.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: I agree. Also, the new pull request process helped a lot.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Good. Now, what can we improve?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: I think communication between teams was a bit slow this sprint.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: I agree. We should share updates more often, maybe daily.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: That's a good idea. Let's write it down as an action item.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Please be honest — I also think our testing process needs work.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Noted. That's another action item for next sprint.

questions.q: What went well this sprint according to Hoa?
What will the team do about testing?
options: Make it an action item for next sprint

shadowing: Let's start the retrospective by talking about what went well this sprint.
Communication between teams was a bit slow this sprint, unfortunately.
We should share updates more often with each other, maybe every day.
Let's write it down as an action item before we finish today.
I also think our testing process needs some work before the next release.
